headline: Consumer Tech News (Mar 9-13): Trump Administration Sues California Over Emissions Targets, Nvidia Announces $26B AI Investment & More
summary: Broadcom, AMD, and Applied Materials expand AI semiconductor capabilities, developing next-gen memory and high-speed networking solutions.

headline: Palantir Partnerships Deepen Role In Mission Critical AI Operations
summary: Palantir Technologies (NasdaqGS:PLTR) announced new partnerships across defense, aerospace, and AI infrastructure. The company introduced an AI OS reference architecture with NVIDIA aimed at sovereign AI opportunities. Alliances with GE Aerospace, Centrus Energy, Ondas, and World View extend Palantir’s AI into operational settings such as aviation, uranium enrichment, and multi-domain intelligence. Palantir, known for its data and AI platforms for government and industrial clients, is...
